name: collector reads rule-cache hit-rate as an Efficiency-and-Flow signal
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && printf '{"hits":80,"misses":20}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/cache/stats.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric cache-hit-rate --since 7d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=efficiency_and_flow' out.txt && grep -q 'cache_hit_rate=0.80' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
